content_sections.heading: Anchaliika Degree Mahavidyalaya Dhenkanal Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for Anchaliika Degree Mahavidyalaya Dhenkanal Various Posts Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: Anchaliika Degree Mahavidyalaya Dhenkanal Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for Lecturer posts?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Lecturer posts at Anchaliika Degree Mahavidyalaya Dhenkanal is scheduled for 20th July 2026. Candidates should ensure they reach the venue on time.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum qualification required for the Lecturer positions?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required for all Lecturer positions is a Master Degree in the concerned subject with 55% or more marks.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for Lecturer posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies for Lecturer posts at Anchaliika Degree Mahavidyalaya Dhenkanal.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for the recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly at the specified venue and time.

faq.question: Q6. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You should carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies of these documents, and recent passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Q7. What are the specific subjects for which Lecturer posts are available?
faq.answer: The available Lecturer posts are in Physics, Chemistry, Odia, and History.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any age limit mentioned for the candidates?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify an age limit. Candidates are advised to check the detailed notification for any age-related information.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these Lecturer positions?
faq.answer: The job type for these Lecturer positions is Contractual.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the venue for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at Anchaliika Degree Mahavidyalaya Dhenkanal, Dhenkanal, Odisha, 759014.
